Bash(python -c "
from intelligent_project_analyzer.services.core_task_decomposer import _simple_fallback_decompose

# 测试1: 只传 user_input（旧的调用方式）
result1 = _simple_fallback_decompose\(''设计一个智能家居系统''\)
print\(f''[TEST 1] 只传 user_input: 生成 {len\(result1\)} 个任务''\)
for t in result1[:3]:
    print\(f''   - {t[""title""]}''\)

# 测试2: 传 user_input + structured_data（修复后的调用方式）
structured_data = {
    ''design_challenge'': ''为年轻家庭设计智能家居控制系统'',
    ''character_narrative'': ''35岁的科技爱好者，有两个孩子'',
    ''project_type_label'': ''住宅设计''
}
result2 = _simple_fallback_decompose\(''设计一个智能家居系统'', structured_data\)
print\(f''[TEST 2] 传 user_input + structured_data: 生成 {len\(result2\)} 个任务''\)
for t in result2[:3]:
    print\(f''   - {t[""title""]}''\)

# 验证修复是否生效
print\(\)
if len\(result2\) >= len\(result1\):
    print\(''[PASS] structured_data 参数正常工作''\)
else:
    print\(''[WARN] 结果数量异常''\)
")

# 验证导入和参数传递
from intelligent_project_analyzer.interaction.nodes.progressive_questionnaire import ProgressiveQuestionnaireNode
from intelligent_project_analyzer.services.core_task_decomposer import _simple_fallback_decompose
import inspect

# 检查 _simple_fallback_decompose 的签名
sig = inspect.signature\(_simple_fallback_decompose\)
print\(''[CHECK] _simple_fallback_decompose 参数:''\)
for name, param in sig.parameters.items\(\):
    default = param.default if param.default != inspect.Parameter.empty else ''必填''
    print\(f''   - {name}: {default}''\)

# 验证修复后的代码
import ast
source_file = ''d:/11-20/langgraph-design/intelligent_project_analyzer/interaction/nodes/progressive_questionnaire.py''
with open\(source_file, ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# 检查第119行和第124行
lines = content.split\(''\\n''\)
print\(\)
print\(''[CHECK] 修复后的代码:''\)
print\(f''   Line 119: {lines[118].strip\(\)}''\)
print\(f''   Line 124: {lines[123].strip\(\)}''\)

# 验证是否包含 structured_data
if ''structured_data'' in lines[118] and ''structured_data'' in lines[123]:
    print\(\)
    print\(''[PASS] 两处调用都已添加 structured_data 参数''\)
else:
    print\(\)
    print\(''[FAIL] 修复不完整''\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from tavily_search import TavilySearchTool
from arxiv_search import ArxivSearchTool
from ragflow_kb import RagflowKBTool
from intelligent_project_analyzer.core.types import ToolConfig

# Check each tool
tools = []

# Tavily
try:
    t = TavilySearchTool\(api_key=''test''\)
    has_name = hasattr\(t, ''name''\)
    has_config = hasattr\(t, ''config''\)
    config_name = t.config.name if has_config else ''N/A''
    tools.append\(f''TavilySearchTool: name={has_name}, config={has_config}, config.name={config_name}''\)
except Exception as e:
    tools.append\(f''TavilySearchTool: ERROR - {e}''\)

# Arxiv  
try:
    a = ArxivSearchTool\(\)
    has_name = hasattr\(a, ''name''\)
    has_config = hasattr\(a, ''config''\)
    config_name = a.config.name if has_config else ''N/A''
    tools.append\(f''ArxivSearchTool: name={has_name}, config={has_config}, config.name={config_name}''\)
except Exception as e:
    tools.append\(f''ArxivSearchTool: ERROR - {e}''\)

# Ragflow
try:
    r = RagflowKBTool\(api_endpoint=''test'', api_key=''test'', dataset_id=''test''\)
    has_name = hasattr\(r, ''name''\)
    has_config = hasattr\(r, ''config''\)
    config_name = r.config.name if has_config else ''N/A''
    tools.append\(f''RagflowKBTool: name={has_name}, config={has_config}, config.name={config_name}''\)
except Exception as e:
    tools.append\(f''RagflowKBTool: ERROR - {e}''\)

for t in tools:
    print\(t\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from intelligent_project_analyzer.services.tool_factory import ToolFactory
from intelligent_project_analyzer.settings import settings

print\(''=== 工具连通性检查 ===\\n''\)

# 检查配置
print\(''📋 配置状态:''\)
print\(f''  Tavily API Key: {""已配置"" if settings.tavily.api_key else ""未配置""}''\)
print\(f''  Bocha Enabled: {settings.bocha.enabled}''\)
print\(f''  Bocha API Key: {""已配置"" if settings.bocha.api_key and settings.bocha.api_key != ""your_bocha_api_key_here"" else ""未配置""}''\)
print\(f''  ArXiv Enabled: {settings.arxiv.enabled}''\)
print\(f''  RAGFlow API Key: {""已配置"" if settings.ragflow.api_key else ""未配置""}\\n''\)

# 创建所有工具
print\(''🔧 创建工具实例...''\)
try:
    tools = ToolFactory.create_all_tools\(\)
    print\(f''✅ 成功创建 {len\(tools\)} 个工具\\n''\)
    
    print\(''📦 可用工具列表:''\)
    for name, tool in tools.items\(\):
        tool_name = getattr\(tool, ''name'', ''unknown''\)
        print\(f''  - {name}: {tool_name}''\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''❌ 工具创建失败: {e}''\)
")
